story: As an Active Recorder, I want to periodically reconcile an account by entering its actual real-world balance, so that I can detect discrepancies between the app's records and reality and correct them with a proper audit trail.
acceptance_criteria: User can initiate a reconciliation for any account from the dashboard or account detail screen
The app displays the account's currently recorded balance alongside a field to enter the actual verified balance
The app shows the discrepancy amount (actual minus recorded)
If discrepancy is zero, the account is marked as reconciled with a timestamp, no transaction is created

For Bank, Cash, and Credit Card accounts: if a discrepancy exists, user can create a correction transaction (Unrecorded Expense or Unrecorded Income) to bring the recorded balance in line with reality
For Investment accounts: if a discrepancy exists, user can create a Revaluation transaction to record the change in asset value
All correction transactions are clearly labeled and distinct from manual entries in the timeline
